title: ephedraceae
intro: The Ephedraceae rank is a family of plants, specifically a group of coniferous shrubs and trees that are native to mountainous regions of the Northern Hemisphere. They are characterized by needle-like leaves and produce small cones. This family includes species such as Ephedra sinica and Ephedra distachya, which have been used in traditional medicine for their stimulant properties. The Ephedraceae family is a relatively small group of plants, comprising about 65 species.
